Model_1_repairs.description: Whether Model 1 cars needed major repairs (>$500) within 2 years of purchase; 53 out of 400 sampled owners reported major repairs. Compared with Model_2_repairs to test for a difference in proportions.

Model_2_repairs.description: Whether Model 2 cars needed major repairs (>$500) within 2 years of purchase; 78 out of 500 sampled owners reported major repairs. Compared with Model_1_repairs to test for a difference in proportions.
